top_signals.title: US Seeks Energy Export Boost to India as Rubio Visits Delhi
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration wants to boost energy exports to India, the US ambassador in New Delhi said on Wednesday, ahead of a multi-day visit by Secretary of State Marco Rubio to the world’s most populous country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SEC reviewing implications of delayed prediction market ETFs, Atkins says
top_signals.summary: SEC Chair Paul Atkins said he instructed the agency's staff to seek public input on prediction market ETFs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
